name: coding-assistants-example
description: Small example dataset for coding assistant evaluation.

items.question: Write a Python function that implements bubble sort and returns the sorted list.
Implement a singly linked list in Python with insert_at_end and delete_by_value methods.

rubric.criterion: Defines Node class with data and next

items.expected_answer: The bug is in the range: range(1, n) excludes n. If n itself is even, it should be included. Fix: range(1, n + 1). Also, the function works correctly for the described behavior (sum of evens from 1 to n-1), but if the intent is to include n, use range(1, n + 1).

rubric.criterion: Provides corrected code with range(1, n+1)
Explains why the original was wrong
